• Browser-based multiplayer mining game with real-time physics and voxel-based terrain
  • Features procedurally generated worlds, resource gathering, and player trading economy
  • Includes crafting system, upgrade shop, and teleporter network for fast travel
  • Supports both desktop and mobile controls with touch-optimized interface
  • Cloud save functionality with conflict resolution and cross-device synchronization
    const GameEngine = class { constructor() { this.canvas = $('gameCanvas'); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); this.minimapCanvas = $('minimap'); this.minimapCtx = this.minimapCanvas.getContext('2d'); } }
    const TILE_TYPES = { EMPTY: 0, DIRT: 1, GRASS: 2, STONE: 3, COAL: 6, IRON: 7, GOLD: 8, DIAMOND: 9, EMERALD: 10, RUBY: 11 };

Mega Miner NG is a browser-based multiplayer mining game built with HTML5 Canvas and WebSockets. Players explore procedurally generated voxel worlds, mine resources, upgrade equipment, and trade with others in real-time. The game features a sophisticated physics engine, dynamic lighting system, and cloud-based save functionality that works across devices.
